context: Tests whether the agent separates TransactionPicker's ephemeral access from persistent FinanceKit authorization and resumable history sync.

checklist.name: Picker access model
checklist.description: Explains that `TransactionPicker` selected transactions are passed directly for immediate use and access is ephemeral, not persistent sync authorization.

checklist.name: Persistent access model
checklist.description: Recommends FinanceKit authorization and account selection for ongoing account, balance, and transaction access.

checklist.name: History API
checklist.description: Uses `transactionHistory(forAccountID:since:isMonitoring:)` with persisted `FinanceStore.HistoryToken` for resumable incremental sync.

checklist.name: Change application
checklist.description: Saves every `changes.newToken` and applies inserted, updated, and deleted changes, including removing locally stored deleted data.

checklist.name: Invalid token recovery
checklist.description: Handles `FinanceError.historyTokenInvalid` by discarding the token and immediately resynchronizing the affected stream.

checklist.name: Avoids full snapshots
checklist.description: Prefers `isMonitoring: false` for catch-up-only sync and avoids fetching complete snapshots every launch.

checklist.name: Boundary discipline
checklist.description: Keeps the answer in FinanceKit/FinanceKitUI rather than drifting into PassKit payment processing or generic data-store architecture.
